summary: 3 film announcements, 4 TV announcements across 5 trades.

film.title: Mupapa
film.studio: Yash Raj Films, Posham Pa Pictures
film.announcement: Ayushmann Khurrana to star in this theatrical collaboration between India's Yash Raj Films and Posham Pa Pictures.

film.title: Possession
film.announcement: Paul Dano boards the Possession remake at Paramount.

film.title: Mimpi Kita: Castle in the Air
film.announcement: Malaysian sci-fi feature charts audience-driven distribution plan ahead of Bucheon Market debut.

tv.title: Breslau
tv.announcement: Disney+ renews Polish drama Breslau for season 2 and orders two more shows from Central Europe.

tv.title: A Shop for Killers
tv.talent: Pachinko and Drive My Car stars joining cast
tv.announcement: Hit Korean thriller sets July season 2 premiere on Disney+ and Hulu with new cast members joining.

tv.title: Colin From Accounts
tv.announcement: Season 3 trailer released with launch set for July 27.

tv.title: A Woman of Substance
tv.announcement: Series heads to Spain as part of TVE sales deal.
